medium_findings.description: False positive: bidi chars are literals inside the INVISIBLE_CHARS detection regex (the defense against trojan-source), not an attack.
Benign: urlopen target is the hardcoded https constant API_URL; no untrusted input. Not SSRF.
Benign: urlopen target is operator-configured base_url, not untrusted request input.
False positive: the line is the bwrap --tmpfs /tmp argument (a private in-sandbox tmpfs confinement control), not a host temp-file operation.

findings.title: Inter-phase reports bypass the quarantine filter applied to tool results

positive_controls: Policy enforced in code at registry dispatch, not in prompts (registry.py)
Fail-closed-everywhere sandbox: shell blocked when no backend passes its startup smoke test (sandbox.py)
Scrubbed child-process environment: provider keys not inherited (builtin.py scrubbed_env)
Layered quarantine: bidi/zero-width stripping, injection scanning, data-not-instructions fencing, secret redaction (quarantine.py)
Structured refusal grammar with hash-chained tamper-evident audit events (registry.py, audit.py)
find_secrets returns kind labels, never credential fragments (v0.3.3)
Minimal dependency surface: one runtime dependency (pyyaml)

methodology.files_analyzed: harness package, 20 modules; OWASP pattern analysis manual; secret + git-history scan across all tracked source; deeper OWASP A01/A04 pass verified (12 of 13 proposed findings refuted, SEC-001 confirmed)
